name: Hot Artichoke Appetizers.
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the frozen artichoke hearts in chicken broth with minced garlic until tender, about 6 minutes.
2. Drain the artichokes.
3. Wrap each artichoke tightly in thinly sliced bacon and secure with a toothpick.
4. Broil until the bacon is crisp.
5. Serve warm. Alternatively, wrap the artichokes in prosciutto and serve cold.
